feedback.happy: We're thrilled you're coming! Get ready for a magical day.
feedback.sad: We'll definitely miss you, but we appreciate you letting us know.
feedback.confused: We understand! Life gets busy. Take your time to decide.

menu.title: The Menu
menu.subtitle: Wedding Feast
menu.description: A selection of fine dishes prepared for our celebration.

starter.title: Starter
starter.name: Burrata & Heirloom Tomato
starter.description: Creamy burrata served with heritage tomatoes, fresh basil pesto, and balsamic glaze.

main.title: Main Course

main.description: Tender beef fillet with truffle mashed potatoes, seasonal greens, and a red wine reduction.

dessert.title: Dessert
dessert.name: Valrhona Chocolate Fondant
dessert.description: Warm chocolate fondant with a molten core, served with Madagascan vanilla bean ice cream.

playlist.description: Get in the mood for our celebration with some of our favorite tunes.
